heading: Definition
label: 2086 Definition
text: As used in this part, the term “Member of the House of Representatives” means a Representative in, or a Delegate or Resident Commissioner to, the Congress.
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 188a–5 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
